promotion_readiness.strict_gate_reason: Raw-activation linear challenger tied the paper MLP, so it does not qualify as a paper-faithful+ challenger win. The available DP-HONEY v4.3 sealed corpus lacks selected-choice metadata and cannot be used as sealed evidence for this Qwen3-4B selected-choice candidate.

reproduction_commands: env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/extract_activations.py --prompts data/trace_collection/structured_prompts.paired_semantic_indirection_v4_480_secret_present_binary.jsonl --output introspection/data/activations/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_windows_l19_l22.pt --model-id Qwen/Qwen3-4B --revision main --device mps --dtype device --layers 19,20,21,22 --pooling readout_window,query_tail_window,selected_choice_window,combined_readout_window

env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/ablate_cift_selector_window_features.py --artifact introspection/data/activations/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_windows_l19_l22.pt --output-json introspection/data/reports/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_l19_l22_feature_ablation_v1.json --output-md introspection/data/reports/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_l19_l22_feature_ablation_v1_summary.md --task safe_secret_vs_exfiltration --baseline-variant selected_choice_l19 --variant selected_choice_l19=selected_choice_window_layer_19 --variant selected_choice_l20=selected_choice_window_layer_20 --variant selected_choice_l21=selected_choice_window_layer_21 --variant selected_choice_l22=selected_choice_window_layer_22 --variant readout_l19=readout_window_layer_19 --variant readout_l20=readout_window_layer_20 --variant readout_l21=readout_window_layer_21 --variant readout_l22=readout_window_layer_22 --variant query_tail_l19=query_tail_window_layer_19 --variant query_tail_l20=query_tail_window_layer_20 --variant query_tail_l21=query_tail_window_layer_21 --variant query_tail_l22=query_tail_window_layer_22 --variant combined_l19=combined_readout_window_layer_19 --variant combined_l20=combined_readout_window_layer_20 --variant combined_l21=combined_readout_window_layer_21 --variant combined_l22=combined_readout_window_layer_22 --folds 5 --seed 42 --max-iter 1000 --regularization-c 1.0

env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/compare_cift_probe_head_to_head.py --artifact introspection/data/activations/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_windows_l19_l22.pt --output-json introspection/data/reports/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_linear_vs_paper_mlp_5seed_v1.json --task safe_secret_vs_exfiltration --activation-feature selected_choice_window_layer_19 --feature-representation raw_activation --paper-probe mlp_128_64_1 --candidate-probe linear_logistic_regression --seeds 11,17,23,29,31

env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/train_cift_model_bundle.py --artifact introspection/data/activations/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_windows_l19_l22.pt --output-bundle introspection/data/models/cift_qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_paper_mlp_candidate_v1.pkl --training-dataset-id qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw --task safe_secret_vs_exfiltration --positive-label exfiltration_intent --activation-feature selected_choice_window_layer_19 --decision-threshold 0.5 --seed 17 --classifier-family paper_mlp --evaluation-report-ids qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_linear_vs_paper_mlp_5seed_v1,qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_calibration_v1,qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_l19_l22_feature_ablation_v1,qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_causal_patching_v1,qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_failure_cases_v1,qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_linear_runtime_prevention_v1,qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_lineage_v1 --score-semantics full_train_classifier_probability --candidate-status runtime_candidate --created-at 2026-06-24T00:00:00Z

env PYTHONPATH=src:introspection/src .venv-introspection/bin/python introspection/scripts/benchmark_live_cift_window_selector.py --runtime-turns introspection/data/runtime_turns_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_clause_expected_window.jsonl --selected-choice-runtime-model introspection/data/models/cift_qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_linear_preview_v1.json --fallback-runtime-model introspection/data/models/cift_qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_readout_l22_raw_linear_fallback_preview_v1.json --output-json introspection/data/reports/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_linear_runtime_prevention_v1.json --output-markdown introspection/data/reports/qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_selected_choice_l19_raw_linear_runtime_prevention_v1_summary.md --detector-name cift_qwen3_4b_watchman_semantic_v4_480_window_selector --feature-source live_hidden_state_qwen3_4b --mock-response ok --model-id Qwen/Qwen3-4B --revision main --device mps --dtype device
